description: Golden example assistant wording for the doctor sample-order flow.

messages.speaker: assistant
messages.message: Dr. Rivera, I can help with that. After verifying your profile, I see that your office currently has Cardiolase Starter Packs available up to 24 packs and Cardiolase Titration Kits available up to 6 kits. Please let me know which product you would like and the quantity you want me to submit, and I can prepare the order for Rivera Cardiology Associates. [Cardiolase Sample Ordering Guide]

messages.speaker: assistant
messages.message: I have prepared the sample order for 12 Cardiolase Starter Packs for Rivera Cardiology Associates, which is within your current available limit. The order can be submitted using the verified shipping location on file for your practice. [Cardiolase Sample Ordering Guide]

response_traits: states only the products and quantities available to that doctor
confirms that the requested quantity is within limit
uses procedural language without unsupported promotional claims
